moments.title: World Cup Third Place Play-off
moments.blurb: England takes on France in the FIFA World Cup 2026 third-place play-off today, after both teams fell short in the semi-finals.

angles.name: Match Hype
angles.copy: It's the Bronze Final! England v France, who takes third place in the World Cup? Kick-off 10pm BST. #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Post-match reflection
angles.copy: The whistle's blown on the World Cup third-place play-off! Who came out on top between England and France?

moments.title: World Cup Final: Spain vs Argentina
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates tomorrow with European champions Spain facing South American and defending world champions Argentina in the final in New York.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: The biggest game in football is almost here! Spain vs Argentina in the World Cup final tomorrow. Who are you backing?

angles.name: Messi's Last Dance?
angles.copy: Could tomorrow be Lionel Messi's last World Cup game? Argentina faces Spain for the trophy.

moments.title: The Open Championship Finale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, concludes tomorrow at Royal Birkdale Golf Club.

angles.name: Golf Grand Finale
angles.copy: It's Championship Sunday at Royal Birkdale! Who will lift the Claret Jug at The Open tomorrow?

angles.name: Final Round Action
angles.copy: The tension is building! Catch the final day of The Open Championship tomorrow as the world's best golfers battle it out.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Latitude Festival, celebrating its 20th anniversary, begins next Thursday, July 23rd, at Henham Park in Suffolk, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival Hype
angles.copy: Get ready, Suffolk! Latitude Festival kicks off next Thursday with David Byrne, Teddy Swims, Lewis Capaldi and more. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Line-up Spotlight
angles.copy: Latitude Festival's 20th anniversary is next week! David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi lead a huge line-up.

moments.title: Love Island UK Grand Final
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated final of Love Island UK 2026 is scheduled for Monday, July 27th, crowning the winning couple after eight weeks of villa drama.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Only just over a week until the Love Island UK final! Who are your front-runners to win the £50k?

angles.name: Drama Recap
angles.copy: The Love Island final is set for July 27th! What's been your favourite dramatic moment from the villa this series?

moments.title: UK School Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Summer holidays are officially underway or starting this week for many schools across England and Wales, with Scotland's already in full swing.

angles.name: Holiday Kick-off
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Wishing all students (and parents!) a fantastic break as the summer holidays officially begin for many across the UK.

angles.name: Local Holiday Vibe
angles.copy: Devon schools are breaking up! What are your plans for the summer holidays in Exeter and beyond?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 19th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we raise a guitar pick to the one and only Brian May, celebrating his 79th birthday! What's your favourite Queen riff?

angles.name: Queen Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Brian May of Queen tomorrow! Still rocking the world.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: The iconic rock and Latin jazz guitarist Carlos Santana turns 79 on Sunday, July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Feeling the rhythm? The legendary Carlos Santana turns 79 on Sunday! What's your go-to Santana track?

angles.name: Timeless Talent
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday wishes to the incredible Carlos Santana this Sunday! Still making magic with his guitar.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist for The Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to The Eagles' Don Henley this Wednesday! What's your favourite Eagles song he sang lead on?

angles.name: Solo & Band
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to 'Boys of Summer', Don Henley turns 79 on Wednesday! Celebrate the Eagles legend.

moments.title: Happy 61st Birthday, Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' legendary lead guitarist, Slash, celebrates his 61st birthday next Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Riff Master
angles.copy: Next Thursday, we celebrate the iconic top hat and even more iconic guitar solos! Happy 61st Birthday to Slash!

angles.name: GNR Legend
angles.copy: Paradise City or Sweet Child o' Mine? Guns N' Roses legend Slash turns 61 next Thursday! What's your favourite GNR track?

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday, Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday next Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: Pop Diva
angles.copy: From the Bronx to global icon! Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only J.Lo next Friday! What's your favourite Jennifer Lopez hit?

angles.name: Ageless Icon
angles.copy: Next Friday, Jennifer Lopez turns 57! Still Jenny from the Block and looking fabulous. Send her some birthday love!

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday, Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday next Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Mick Jagger turns 83 next Sunday! The ultimate rock 'n' roll frontman still has the moves. What's your favourite Stones anthem?

angles.name: Ageless Performer
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the iconic Mick Jagger next Sunday! Still proving that age is just a number when it comes to rock. #TheRollingStones

moments.title: Reading & Leeds Festivals Build-Up
moments.blurb: Reading & Leeds Festivals, set for August 27-30, 2026, are generating buzz with a major stage revamp and headliners including Charli XCX, Dave, Florence + The Machine, and Kasabian.

angles.name: Festival anticipation
angles.copy: Reading & Leeds are just over a month away! Get ready for a huge weekend with Charli XCX, Dave, Florence + The Machine and more. What acts are you buzzing for?

angles.name: Line-up tease
angles.copy: Dreaming of the fields? Reading & Leeds Festivals are gearing up for a massive August Bank Holiday weekend with a stellar line-up!
